523 PRNTRL_7_DAY_CD PRNTRL_7_DAY_CD Nutritional Approaches (7 days): Parenteral CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient has received Parenteral/IV feeding as their nutritional approach in the past seven days. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
